infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: ZamboAlert uses Bluetooth to broadcast an SOS beacon that nearby rescuer pods can detect when you have no cellular signal.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: ZamboAlert uses Bluetooth to broadcast an SOS beacon that nearby rescuer pods can detect when you have no cellular signal.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ZamboAlert uses your location to attach coordinates to your SOS beacon when GPS is available.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ZamboAlert uses your location in the background so rescuers can find you even while the app is minimized.
